reason: Service/module/component boundary rules for adding a left-panel readout backed by a singleton service.
Verification commands, live data polling constraints, fallback behavior, qmldir updates, and tactical visual language.
This feature spans /proc/process data collection, service shaping, and left-panel display; define boundaries and fallbacks.
Reuse existing MetricBlock/Sparkline and SystemStats polling patterns instead of duplicating UI/service logic unnecessarily.
